zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas John Wilmouth於1680年出生在美國加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼時，他的父親John Wilmot33歲，母親Elizabeth Mallet29歲。他於1700年與Mary Tysen Swaim在美國加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1750年在美國維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas John Wilmouth于1680年出生在美国加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼时，他的父亲John Wilmot33岁，母亲Elizabeth Mallet29岁。他于1700年与Mary Tysen Swaim在美国加州溫圖拉波普阿可弗吉尼亞 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1750年在美国弗吉尼亚州奧古斯塔享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州奧古斯塔。

nameMeanings.name: Wilmouth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas John Wilmouth was born in 1680, in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, United States, his father, John Wilmot, was 33 and his mother, Elizabeth Mallet, was 29. He married Mary Tysen Swaim in 1700, in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1750, in Augusta, Virginia, United States, at the age of 70, and was buried in Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas John Wilmouth est né en 1680, à Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Californie, États-Unis, son père, John Wilmot, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mallet, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary Tysen Swaim en 1700, à Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Californie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1750, à Augusta, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Augusta, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Er hat 1700 in Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Kalifornien, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Tysen Swaim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1750 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Augusta, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas John Wilmouthが1680年にアメリカ合衆国カリフォルニア州ベントゥラムールパークバージニア コロニーで生まれた時，父John Wilmotは33歳，母Elizabeth Malletは29歳であった。1700年にアメリカ合衆国カリフォルニア州ベントゥラムールパークバージニア コロニーでMary Tysen Swaimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1750年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州アウグスタで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州アウグスタにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas John Wilmouth(이)가 1680년 미국 캘리포니아 주 븐투라 무르박 버지니아 콜론이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wilmot(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mallet(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1700년 미국 캘리포니아 주 븐투라 무르박 버지니아 콜론이에서 Mary Tysen Swaim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1750년 미국 버지니아 주 오구스타에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 오구스타에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas John Wilmouth nasceu em 1680, em Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Califórnia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, John Wilmot, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mallet, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Tysen Swaim em 1700, em Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, Califórnia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1750, em Augusta, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Augusta, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas John Wilmouth родился в 1680 г. в местности виргиня колони, мурпарк, вентура, Калифорния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени John Wilmot было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mallet, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Tysen Swaim в 1700 г. в местности виргиня колони, мурпарк, вентура, Калифорния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1750 г. в местности аугуста, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности аугуста, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

Se casó con Mary Tysen Swaim en 1700, en Virginia Colony, Moorpark, Ventura, California, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
